title: Imperfect intro: was and used to
subtitle: Describe background with era and estaba.
overview: Use the imperfect for background, description, and repeated past actions.
Do not force every past idea into the preterite.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: it was weather / used to do

items.es: Cuando era niño, vivía en una ciudad pequeña.
items.en: When I was a child, I lived in a small city.

items.es: La casa era vieja, pero bonita.
items.en: The house was old, but pretty.

items.es: Mi familia tenía un coche pequeño.
items.en: My family had a small car.
It was cold in the morning.
